name: Padded Armor
description: AC 11 + Dex modifier. Stealth: Disadvantage. Padded armor consists of quilted layers of cloth and batting. (Light Armor — 1 Minute to Don or Doff)

name: Leather Armor
description: AC 11 + Dex modifier. The breastplate and shoulder protectors of this armor are made of leather that has been stiffened by being boiled in oil. The rest of the armor is made of softer and more flexible materials. (Light Armor — 1 Minute to Don or Doff)

name: Studded Leather Armor
description: AC 12 + Dex modifier. Made from tough but flexible leather, studded leather is reinforced with close-set rivets or spikes. (Light Armor — 1 Minute to Don or Doff)

name: Hide Armor
description: AC 12 + Dex modifier (max 2). This crude armor consists of thick furs and pelts. It is commonly worn by barbarian tribes, evil humanoids, and other folk who lack access to the tools and materials needed to create better armor. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Chain Shirt
description: AC 13 + Dex modifier (max 2). Made of interlocking metal rings, a chain shirt is worn between layers of clothing or leather. This armor offers modest protection to the wearer's upper body and allows the sound of the rings rubbing against one another to be muffled by outer layers. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Scale Mail
description: AC 14 + Dex modifier (max 2). Stealth: Disadvantage. This armor consists of a coat and leggings (and perhaps a separate skirt) of leather covered with overlapping pieces of metal, much like the scales of a fish. The suit includes gauntlets. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Breastplate
description: AC 14 + Dex modifier (max 2). This armor consists of a fitted metal chest piece worn with supple leather. Although it leaves the legs and arms relatively unprotected, this armor provides good protection for the wearer's vital organs while leaving the wearer relatively unencumbered. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Half Plate Armor
description: AC 15 + Dex modifier (max 2). Stealth: Disadvantage. Half plate consists of shaped metal plates that cover most of the wearer's body. It does not include leg protection beyond simple greaves that are attached with leather straps. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Ring Mail
description: AC 14. Stealth: Disadvantage. This armor is leather armor with heavy rings sewn into it. The rings help reinforce the armor against blows from swords and axes. Ring mail is inferior to chain mail, and it's usually worn only by those who can't afford better armor. (Heavy Armor — 10 Minutes to Don, 5 Minutes to Doff)

name: Chain Mail
description: AC 16. Strength: 13. Stealth: Disadvantage. Made of interlocking metal rings, chain mail includes a layer of quilted fabric worn underneath the mail to prevent chafing and to cushion the impact of blows. The suit includes gauntlets. (Heavy Armor — 10 Minutes to Don, 5 Minutes to Doff)

name: Splint Armor
description: AC 17. Strength: 15. Stealth: Disadvantage. This armor is made of narrow vertical strips of metal riveted to a backing of leather that is worn over cloth padding. Flexible chain mail protects the joints. (Heavy Armor — 10 Minutes to Don, 5 Minutes to Doff)

name: Plate Armor
description: AC 18. Strength: 15. Stealth: Disadvantage. Plate consists of shaped, interlocking metal plates to cover the entire body. A suit of plate includes gauntlets, heavy leather boots, a visored helmet, and thick layers of padding underneath the armor. Buckles and straps distribute the weight over the body. (Heavy Armor — 10 Minutes to Don, 5 Minutes to Doff)

name: Shield
description: AC +2. A shield is made from wood or metal and is carried in one hand. Wielding a shield increases your Armor Class by 2. You can benefit from only one shield at a time. (Utilize Action to Don or Doff)

name: Club
description: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Light. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Dagger
description: 1d4 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Nick. Weight: 1 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Greatclub
description: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: Two-Handed. Mastery: Push. Weight: 10 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Handaxe
description: 1d6 Slashing. Properties: Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Javelin
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 30/120). Mastery: Slow. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Light Hammer
description: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Nick. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Mace
description: 1d6 Bludgeoning. Mastery: Sap. Weight: 4 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Quarterstaff
description: 1d6 Bludgeoning. Properties: Versatile (1d8). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 4 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Sickle
description: 1d4 Slashing. Properties: Light. Mastery: Nick. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Spear
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 20/60), Versatile (1d8). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 3 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Dart
description: 1d4 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Vex. Weight: 1/4 lb. (Simple Ranged Weapon)

name: Light Crossbow
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 80/320; Bolt), Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 5 lb. (Simple Ranged Weapon)

name: Shortbow
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 80/320; Arrow), Two-Handed. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Ranged Weapon)

name: Sling
description: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/120; Bullet). Mastery: Slow. (Simple Ranged Weapon)

name: Battleaxe
description: 1d8 Slashing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 4 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Flail
description: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Mastery: Sap. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Glaive
description: 1d10 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Graze. Weight: 6 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Greataxe
description: 1d12 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Cleave. Weight: 7 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Greatsword
description: 2d6 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Graze. Weight: 6 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Halberd
description: 1d10 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Cleave. Weight: 6 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Lance
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed (unless mounted). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 6 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Longsword
description: 1d8 Slashing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Maul
description: 2d6 Bludgeoning. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Topple. Weight: 10 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Morningstar
description: 1d8 Piercing. Mastery: Sap. Weight: 4 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Pike
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Push. Weight: 18 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Rapier
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Finesse. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Scimitar
description: 1d6 Slashing. Properties: Finesse, Light. Mastery: Nick. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Shortsword
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Trident
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 20/60), Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 4 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: War Pick
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Warhammer
description: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Push. Weight: 5 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Whip
description: 1d4 Slashing. Properties: Finesse, Reach. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Blowgun
description: 1 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 25/100; Needle), Loading. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 1 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Hand Crossbow
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/120; Bolt), Light, Loading. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Heavy Crossbow
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 100/400; Bolt), Heavy, Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Push. Weight: 18 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Longbow
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 150/600; Arrow), Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Musket
description: 1d12 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 40/120; Bullet), Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 10 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Pistol
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/90; Bullet), Loading. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Alchemist's Supplies
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Identify a substance (DC 15), or start a fire (DC 15). Craft: Acid, Alchemist's Fire, Component Pouch, Oil, Paper, Perfume. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Brewer's Supplies
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 9 lb. Utilize: Detect poisoned drink (DC 15), or identify alcohol (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Calligrapher's Supplies
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Write text with impressive flourishes that guard against forgery (DC 15). Craft: Ink, Spell Scroll. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Carpenter's Tools
description: Ability: Strength. Weight: 6 lb. Utilize: Seal or pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Barrel, Chest, Ladder, Pole, Portable Ram, Torch. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Cartographer's Tools
description: Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 6 lb. Utilize: Draft a map of a small area (DC 15). Craft: Map. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Cobbler's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Modify footwear to give Advantage on the wearer's next Dexterity (Acrobatics) check (DC 10). Craft: Climber's Kit. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Cook's Utensils
description: Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Improve food's flavor (DC 10), or detect spoiled or poisoned food (DC 15). Craft: Rations. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Glassblower's Tools
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Discern what a glass object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Glass Bottle, Magnifying Glass, Spyglass, Vial. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Jeweler's Tools
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Discern a gem's value (DC 15). Craft: Arcane Focus, Holy Symbol. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Leatherworker's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Add a design to a leather item (DC 10). Craft: Sling, Whip, Hide Armor, Leather Armor, Studded Leather Armor, Backpack, Crossbow Bolt Case, Map or Scroll Case, Parchment, Pouch, Quiver, Waterskin. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Mason's Tools
description: Ability: Strength. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Chisel a symbol or hole in stone (DC 10). Craft: Block and Tackle. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Painter's Supplies
description: Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Paint a recognizable image of something you've seen (DC 10). Craft: Druidic Focus, Holy Symbol. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Potter's Tools
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Discern what a ceramic object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Jug, Lamp. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Smith's Tools
description: Ability: Strength. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Any Melee weapon (except Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, and Whip), Medium armor (except Hide), Heavy armor, Ball Bearings, Bucket, Caltrops, Chain, Crowbar, Firearm Bullets, Grappling Hook, Iron Pot, Iron Spikes, Sling Bullets. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Tinker's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 10 lb. Utilize: Assemble a Tiny item composed of scrap, which falls apart in 1 minute (DC 20). Craft: Musket, Pistol, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, Flask, Hooded Lantern, Hunter's Trap, Lock, Manacles, Mirror, Shovel, Signal Whistle, Tinderbox. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Weaver's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Mend a tear in clothing (DC 10), or sew a Tiny design (DC 10). Craft: Padded Armor, Basket, Bedroll, Blanket, Fine Clothes, Net, Robe, Rope, Sack, String, Tent, Traveler's Clothes. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Woodcarver's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Carve a pattern in wood (DC 10). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Ranged weapons (except Pistol, Musket, and Sling), Arcane Focus, Arrows, Bolts, Druidic Focus, Ink Pen, Needles. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Disguise Kit
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Apply makeup (DC 10). Craft: Costume.

name: Forgery Kit
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Mimic 10 or fewer words of someone else's handwriting (DC 15), or duplicate a wax seal (DC 20).

name: Dice Set
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). (Gaming Set)

name: Dragonchess Set
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). (Gaming Set)

name: Playing Cards
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). (Gaming Set)

name: Three-Dragon Ante Set
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). (Gaming Set)

name: Herbalism Kit
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Identify a plant (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin, Candle, Healer's Kit, Potion of Healing.

name: Bagpipes
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 6 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Drum
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Dulcimer
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 10 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Flute
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 1 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Horn
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Lute
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Lyre
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Pan Flute
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Shawm
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 1 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Viol
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 1 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Navigator's Tools
description: Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Plot a course (DC 10), or determine position by stargazing (DC 15).

name: Poisoner's Kit
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Detect a poisoned object (DC 10). Craft: Basic Poison.

name: Thieves' Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 1 lb. Utilize: Pick a lock (DC 15), or disarm a trap (DC 15).
